title: SOL Chalkboard with Chalk & Eraser Set, 21 x 28cm Small Chalkboard for Kids, Lightweight & Portable Blackboard with Wooden Frame, Wall Mounting, Ideal for Home, Office, Classrooms & Creative Drawings
features: Have Fun With the Kids - Our small chalkboard is suitable for kids and they will love it.
Easy To Write On And Wipe Off - Chalk board sign can be cleaned without leaving any residue.
To-Do List You Won't Skip - Our chalkboards can be used to mount on the fridge door for lists.
Perfect for any occasions. From making it a welcoming outdoor chalkboard for a garden wedding, or great as a menu or specials board in your restaurant or coffee shop.

Can be set up in landscape or portrait. Our 21 x 28cm can be set up for different orientation, be it landscape or portrait. You can let it sit on your table or countertop, and it can also be mounted and put up in your wall.

The chalkboard measures 21 x 28 cm, making it a perfect size for kids, school, office, and home use. How easy is it to clean the chalkboard after use? The chalkboard can be easily wiped clean without leaving any residue, ensuring a fresh surface for each use. Can this chalkboard be used for different occasions? Yes, it's perfect for various occasions like garden weddings, restaurant menus, or as an outdoor chalkboard sign. Does the chalkboard come with chalk included? Yes, the chalkboard set includes six pieces of chalk in white, red, green, blue, and yellow colours. Can the chalkboard be used in different orientations? Absolutely, the chalkboard can be set up in either landscape or portrait orientation and can be mounted on a wall or placed on a table.
